runs.driving_observable: Fresh post-IPO lockups (listed 2026-06-12); free float tightly held and first expiry not imminent. No softening sentiment and no expiry approaching, so AMBER thresholds are not met.

observables.etf_passive_inclusion_status: Newly listed; not yet index-eligible. Future inclusion would change the holder base abruptly.

runs.next_escalation_trigger: First lockup-expiry date coincident with softening sentiment, or a turnover spike on a down day.

fire_sales.driving_observable: Price near post-IPO high (~$160.95 vs $135 offer), so stock-settled obligations (Cursor stock component, Valor leases) are well-covered with headroom above any trigger. NOTE: trigger levels are unquantified (null) -- GREEN is inferred from price-near-high, not from known triggers; lower confidence than runs/interconnections.

observables.cursor_acq_stock_component: Pending Cursor acquisition carries a large Class A stock component; termination/deferred-service fees payable in stock or cash (confirm terms from filing).
observables.valor_equipment_lease_exposure: Valor board-linked equipment leases, ~$20B exposure (per brief).
observables.counterparties_holding_spcx_as_asset: Valor, Cursor consideration, acquisition/vendor counterparties — full map pending filings.

fire_sales.next_escalation_trigger: Price approaching the nearest stock-settled-obligation or margin trigger level (level currently unquantified — pull from filings).

interconnections.driving_observable: Counterparty web (xAI, Anthropic, Valor, Cursor) intact with no node under visible stress; IPO-pipeline narrative positive and the compute-revenue/sentiment reflexive loop running in the up direction post-IPO. AMBER requires stress at a node -- none present. Highest latent fragility of the three; watch the reflexive loop closely.

observables.counterparty_web_status: Dense web: xAI (absorbed subsidiary), Anthropic (compute customer at Colossus/Memphis), Valor (lessor ~$20B), Cursor (pending acquisition).
observables.compute_revenue_dependency: Neocloud revenue depends on AI-sector demand driven by the same sentiment cycle pricing SPCX — reflexive loop.
observables.ipo_pipeline_status: TD-frontier pipeline reportedly watching (OpenAI/Anthropic); SPCX framed as door-opener.

interconnections.next_escalation_trigger: Stress at a second node (AI capex slowdown, IPO-pipeline failure) while one is already stressed; reflexive compute-revenue/sentiment loop turning negative.
